description: Unified search protocols for all portals. Each search type has input, analysis flow, verdict options, and feedback capture.

support_user_search.name: Find User & Determine Escalation Path
support_user_search.description: Search by email or UUID. Returns account status + risk flags. Support agent decides: help / escalate to fraud / escalate to KYC.

analysisFlow.name: Get Risk Level (sanitized)
analysisFlow.note: Support sees ONLY risk_level (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH), not raw score or flags

verdictOptions.label: ✅ Safe to Help
verdictOptions.description: Account is clean. Help with ticket.

verdictOptions.label: ⚠️ Escalate to Fraud
verdictOptions.description: Risk flags present. Send to fraud team.

verdictOptions.label: ⏳ Escalate to KYC
verdictOptions.description: Account not fully verified. KYC team needs to review.

verdictOptions.label: ❓ Request More Info
verdictOptions.description: Missing data. Ask customer for clarification.

feedbackCapture.thumbsUp: Agent agrees with verdict. Log as training data.
feedbackCapture.thumbsDown: Agent disagrees. Capture what agent chose instead + why (optional note).

fraud_user_search.name: Investigate User for Fraud Risk
fraud_user_search.description: Search by email or UUID. Returns transaction patterns, network analysis, Elliptic risk. Fraud agent decides: approve / escalate / block.
fraud_user_search.placeholder: Enter user email or UUID to investigate

analysisFlow.name: Get Transaction Pattern
analysisFlow.query: Last 90 days: count, volume, max tx, 24h/7d counts, destination countries

analysisFlow.name: Network Analysis
analysisFlow.query: Accounts sharing IP or device fingerprint with this user

analysisFlow.name: Generate Recommendation
analysisFlow.logic: IF elliptic_score > 70 OR tx_count_24h > 20 THEN BLOCK; ELSE IF elliptic_score > 40 OR tx_count_24h > 10 OR max_tx > 10000 THEN ESCALATE; ELSE APPROVE

verdictOptions.label: ⚠️ Escalate
verdictOptions.description: Medium risk. Needs review by senior fraud analyst.
verdictOptions.conditions: Elliptic 40-70 OR tx_24h 10-20 OR max_tx $10K-$100K OR shared_network

feedbackCapture.thumbsUp: Fraud agent agrees with Vigya's recommendation.
feedbackCapture.thumbsDown: Fraud agent overrides. Log actual decision + agent's reasoning.

kyc_user_search.name: Review User KYC Application
kyc_user_search.description: Search by email or UUID. Returns Persona inquiry data, country risk, document status. KYC agent decides: approve / reject (with template) / EDD required.
kyc_user_search.placeholder: Enter user email or UUID for KYC review

analysisFlow.name: Check Restricted Countries
analysisFlow.logic: Cross-reference country against [CU, IR, KP, MM, SY] list. Flag if match.

verdictOptions.label: ✅ Approve
verdictOptions.message: Identity verified successfully. Documents meet KYC requirements per POL-BSA-001-v4.2 §3.1.
verdictOptions.conditions: All documents valid, country not restricted, risk_level not HIGH

verdictOptions.label: ❌ Reject — Document Expired
verdictOptions.message: Document has expired. Please re-submit a valid, unexpired government-issued ID.

verdictOptions.label: ❌ Reject — Data Mismatch
verdictOptions.message: Name or DOB on document does not match submitted information. Please re-submit matching documents.

verdictOptions.label: ❌ Reject — Poor Image Quality
verdictOptions.message: Document image is not legible. Please re-submit a clear, unobstructed photo of your ID.
verdictOptions.conditions: Image quality flag from Persona API

verdictOptions.label: ❌ Reject — Restricted Jurisdiction
verdictOptions.message: Account cannot be opened for applicants from restricted jurisdictions per POL-BSA-001-v4.2 §6.2.

verdictOptions.label: ⏳ EDD Required
verdictOptions.message: Enhanced Due Diligence required based on risk profile. Pending additional documentation.

feedbackCapture.thumbsUp: KYC analyst agrees with Vigya's recommendation.
feedbackCapture.thumbsDown: KYC analyst overrides. Log actual decision + agent's reasoning.

tm_user_search.name: Investigate Transaction Alert
tm_user_search.description: Search by email or UUID. Returns transaction patterns, Elliptic/Kount risk, SAR recommendation. TM agent decides: approve / escalate / file SAR.
tm_user_search.placeholder: Enter user email or UUID for alert investigation

analysisFlow.name: Get Transaction Pattern
analysisFlow.query: Last 90 days: count (24h/7d/30d), volume, max/min tx, destination countries, currencies

analysisFlow.name: Network Analysis
analysisFlow.query: Accounts sharing IP or device with this user

analysisFlow.name: Calculate SAR Requirement
analysisFlow.logic: IF elliptic_score > 60 OR total_volume > $10K OR tx_count > 50 THEN sar_required = true; deadline = 30 days
analysisFlow.ewra: ⚠️ EWRA-20: HIGH Residual Risk — PRO-TM-003 open until Q3 2026

verdictOptions.label: ⚠️ Escalate
verdictOptions.description: Medium risk. Needs senior review. SAR decision pending.

verdictOptions.label: 📋 File SAR
verdictOptions.description: High risk. Suspicious activity meets SAR threshold. File Suspicious Activity Report.
verdictOptions.conditions: Elliptic > 60 OR volume > $10K OR tx_count > 50 OR unusual_pattern

feedbackCapture.thumbsUp: TM analyst agrees with SAR recommendation.
feedbackCapture.thumbsDown: TM analyst disagrees. Log actual decision + reasoning.

structure.outcome: Only logged after case closes (from Freshdesk/Jira)

learningCycle: Agent searches user → Vigya returns verdict
Log entry created (searchType, user, vigyaVerdict, agentChoice, agreement)
Case closes in Freshdesk/Jira → outcome auto-logged
Weekly: Vigya analyzes feedback → updates verdict confidence scores
Monthly: Report on which verdicts had highest agent agreement + best outcomes

portalCustomization.note: Each portal sees only its own search type. Buttons, prompts, and messages are role-specific.
